name: stock-pitch
description: Build and deploy institutional-quality equity research portals on Cloudflare Workers. Generates 5 interconnected pages (index, memo, interactive model, slide deck, consensus) from primary sources (SEC filings, IR materials, live market data). Sector-aware model templates for mega-cap tech, alt asset managers, consumer staples M&A, industrials, REITs, trucking, SaaS, financials, and healthcare.
